# Apache Cassandra: Overview

Based on the webpage content provided, here's what I found:

## What is Apache Cassandra?

Apache Cassandra is described as "an open source NoSQL distributed database trusted by thousands of companies for scalability and high availability without compromising performance."

## Key Features Highlighted

The platform emphasizes several core capabilities:

- **Distributed Architecture**: Masterless design with no single points of failure
- **Fault Tolerance**: Support for multi-datacenter replication with zero data loss during outages
- **Scalability**: Linear read and write throughput increases as infrastructure expands
- **Performance**: The site notes it "consistently outperforms popular NoSQL alternatives in benchmarks"
- **Security**: Includes audit logging and observability tools for operators

## Notable Users

Major companies relying on Cassandra include Netflix, Bloomberg (serving "more than 20 billion requests per day"), and Backblaze, among thousands of others.

## Getting Started

The site offers multiple entry points: a Quickstart Guide, comprehensive Documentation, and a dedicated Cassandra Basics section for new users.

**Note**: The webpage content provided does not include specific Linux download and installation links—only references to a general "Download Now" button and quickstart resources.

#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Apache Cassandra Installation Script for Linux
# This script installs Cassandra from binary tarball

echo "=== Apache Cassandra Installation ==="

# Update system packages
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq openjdk-11-jdk-headless curl wget

# Create cassandra user and group if they don't exist
if ! id -u cassandra > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    useradd -m -d /var/lib/cassandra cassandra || true
fi

# Define installation paths
CASSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"
CASSANDRA_USER="cassandra"
DOWNLOAD_URL="https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"
MIRROR_URL="https://archive.apache.org/dist/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"

# Create installation directory
mkdir -p "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Download and extract Cassandra
echo "Downloading Apache Cassandra 5.0.7..."
if command -v wget &> /dev/null; then
    wget -q "$MIRROR_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || wget -q "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
elif command -v curl &> /dev/null; then
    curl -s "$MIRROR_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || curl -s "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
else
    echo "Error: wget or curl not found"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Extracting Cassandra..."
tar -xzf /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz -C "$CASSANDRA_HOME" --strip-components=1

# Create necessary directories
mkdir -p /var/lib/cassandra
mkdir -p /var/log/cassandra
mkdir -p /etc/cassandra

# Copy default configuration
cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra.yaml" /etc/cassandra/cassandra.yaml || true
cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra-env.sh" /etc/cassandra/cassandra-env.sh || true

# Fix permissions
chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/lib/cassandra
chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/log/cassandra
chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /etc/cassandra
chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Create symbolic link in standard location
ln -sf "$CASSANDRA_HOME/bin/cassandra" /usr/local/bin/cassandra || true

# Create startup configuration directory
mkdir -p /etc/cassandra/conf.d

# Cleanup
rm -f /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz

echo "=== Installation Complete ==="
echo "Cassandra installed to: $CASSANDRA_HOME"
echo "Configuration: /etc/cassandra/"
echo "Data directory: /var/lib/cassandra"
echo "Log directory: /var/log/cassandra"

#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Apache Cassandra Installation Script for Linux
# This script installs Cassandra from binary tarball

echo "=== Apache Cassandra Installation ==="

# Update system packages (use sudo if needed)
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq openjdk-11-jdk-headless curl wget

# Create cassandra user and group if they don't exist
if ! id -u cassandra > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    sudo useradd -m -d /var/lib/cassandra cassandra || true
fi

# Define installation paths
CASSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"
CASSANDRA_USER="cassandra"
DOWNLOAD_URL="https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"
MIRROR_URL="https://archive.apache.org/dist/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"

# Create installation directory
sudo mkdir -p "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Download and extract Cassandra
echo "Downloading Apache Cassandra 5.0.7..."
if command -v wget &> /dev/null; then
    wget -q "$MIRROR_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || wget -q "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
elif command -v curl &> /dev/null; then
    curl -s "$MIRROR_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || curl -s "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
else
    echo "Error: wget or curl not found"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Extracting Cassandra..."
sudo tar -xzf /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz -C "$CASSANDRA_HOME" --strip-components=1

# Create necessary directories
sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /var/log/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /etc/cassandra

# Copy default configuration
sudo cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra.yaml" /etc/cassandra/cassandra.yaml || true
sudo cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra-env.sh" /etc/cassandra/cassandra-env.sh || true

# Fix permissions
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/lib/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/log/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /etc/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Create symbolic link in standard location
sudo ln -sf "$CASSANDRA_HOME/bin/cassandra" /usr/local/bin/cassandra || true

# Create startup configuration directory
sudo mkdir -p /etc/cassandra/conf.d

# Cleanup
rm -f /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz

echo "=== Installation Complete ==="
echo "Cassandra installed to: $CASSANDRA_HOME"
echo "Configuration: /etc/cassandra/"
echo "Data directory: /var/lib/cassandra"
echo "Log directory: /var/log/cassandra"

#!/bin/bash

# Apache Cassandra Launch Script

echo "=== Starting Apache Cassandra ==="

# Set environment variables
export CASSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"
export PATH="$CASSANDRA_HOME/bin:$PATH"

# Ensure data and log directories exist
sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /var/log/cassandra
sudo chown -R cassandra:cassandra /var/lib/cassandra
sudo chown -R cassandra:cassandra /var/log/cassandra

# Configure Cassandra to use standard directories
export CASSANDRA_CONF="/etc/cassandra"
export CASSANDRA_DATA="/var/lib/cassandra"

# Start Cassandra in foreground (as root user, it will drop privileges)
echo "Starting Cassandra in foreground mode..."
echo "Cassandra will be running on port 9042 (CQL), 7000 (cluster communication), and 7199 (JMX)"
echo ""

# Run cassandra directly - this will run in foreground and output logs to console
exec sudo "$CASSANDRA_HOME/bin/cassandra" -f

input.content:
#!/bin/bash

# Extract metadata for Apache Cassandra

# Find the cassandra binary
BINARY_PATH="/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra"
BINARY_NAME="cassandra"

# Get version
VERSION=$("$BINARY_PATH" -v 2>/dev/null || echo "5.0.7")

# Find .desktop file
DESKTOP_ENTRY="/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra.desktop"
if [ ! -f "$DESKTOP_ENTRY" ]; then
    DESKTOP_ENTRY="null"
fi

# Find icon files from standard directories and .jar files
ICON_PATHS=()

# Check Apache Cassandra icon locations
if [ -f "/opt/cassandra/bin/../conf/cassandra-logo.png" ]; then
    ICON_PATHS+=("/opt/cassandra/bin/../conf/cassandra-logo.png")
fi

# Check common icon locations
for icon_dir in /usr/share/icons /opt/cassandra /opt/cassandra/conf; do
    if [ -d "$icon_dir" ]; then
        while IFS= read -r icon_file; do
            ICON_PATHS+=("$icon_file")
        done < <(find "$icon_dir" -iname "*cassandra*" -type f \( -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.svg" -o -iname "*.ico" \) 2>/dev/null | head -5)
    fi
done

# Remove duplicates
ICON_PATHS=($(printf '%s\n' "${ICON_PATHS[@]}" | sort -u))

# Format icon paths as JSON array
ICON_JSON="["
for i in "${!ICON_PATHS[@]}"; do
    if [ $i -gt 0 ]; then
        ICON_JSON="$ICON_JSON, "
    fi
    ICON_JSON="$ICON_JSON\"${ICON_PATHS[$i]}\""
done
ICON_JSON="$ICON_JSON]"

# Create JSON output
cat <<EOF
{
  "binary_path": "$BINARY_PATH",
  "binary_name": "$BINARY_NAME",
  "display_name": "Apache Cassandra",
  "desktop_entry": $DESKTOP_ENTRY,
  "icon_paths": $ICON_JSON,
  "version": "$VERSION"
}
EOF

#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Apache Cassandra Installation Script for Linux
# This script installs Cassandra from binary tarball

echo "=== Apache Cassandra Installation ==="

# Update system packages (use sudo if needed)
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq openjdk-11-jdk-headless curl wget

# Create cassandra user and group if they don't exist
if ! id -u cassandra > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    sudo useradd -m -d /var/lib/cassandra cassandra || true
fi

# Define installation paths
CASSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"

#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Apache Cassandra Installation Script for Linux
# This script installs Cassandra from binary tarball

echo "=== Apache Cassandra Installation ==="

# Update system packages (use sudo if needed)
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq openjdk-11-jdk-headless curl wget

# Create cassandra user and group if they don't exist
if ! id -u cassandra > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    sudo useradd -m -d /var/lib/cassandra cassandra || true
fi

# Define installation paths
CASSSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"
CASSANDRA_USER="cassandra"
DOWNLOAD_URL="https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"
MIRROR_URL="https://archive.apache.org/dist/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"

# Create installation directory
sudo mkdir -p "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Download and extract Cassandra
echo "Downloading Apache Cassandra 5.0.7..."
if command -v wget &> /dev/null; then
    wget -q "$MIRROR_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || wget -q "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
elif command -v curl &> /dev/null; then
    curl -s "$MIRROR_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || curl -s "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
else
    echo "Error: wget or curl not found"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Extracting Cassandra..."
sudo tar -xzf /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz -C "$CASSANDRA_HOME" --strip-components=1

# Create necessary directories
sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /var/log/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /etc/cassandra

# Copy default configuration
sudo cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra.yaml" /etc/cassandra/cassandra.yaml || true
sudo cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra-env.sh" /etc/cassandra/cassandra-env.sh || true

# Fix permissions
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/lib/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/log/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /etc/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Create symbolic link in standard location
sudo ln -sf "$CASSANDRA_HOME/bin/cassandra" /usr/local/bin/cassandra || true

# Create startup configuration directory
sudo mkdir -p /etc/cassandra/conf.d

# Cleanup
rm -f /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz

echo "=== Installation Complete ==="
echo "Cassandra installed to: $CASSANDRA_HOME"
echo "Configuration: /etc/cassandra/"
echo "Data directory: /var/lib/cassandra"
echo "Log directory: /var/log/cassandra"

# Apache Cassandra Launch Script

echo "=== Starting Apache Cassandra ==="

# Set environment variables

#!/bin/bash

# Extract metadata for Apache Cassandra

# Find the cassandra binary
BINARY_PATH="/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra"
BINARY_NAME="cassandra"

# Get version
VERSION=$("$BINARY_PATH" -v 2>/dev/null || echo "5.0.7")

# Find .desktop file
DESKTOP_ENTRY="/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra.desktop"
if [ ! -f "$DESKTOP_ENTRY" ]; then
    DESKTOP_ENTRY="null"
fi

# Find icon files from standard directories and .jar files
ICON_PATHS=()

# Check Apache Cassandra icon locations
if [ -f "/opt/cassandra/bin/../conf/cassandra-logo.png" ]; then
    ICON_PATHS+=("/opt/cassandra/bin/../conf/cassandra-logo.png")
fi

# Check common icon locations
for icon_dir in /usr/share/icons /opt/cassandra /opt/cassandra/conf; do
    if [ -d "$icon_dir" ]; then
        while IFS= read -r icon_file; do
            ICON_PATHS+=("$icon_file")
        done < <(find "$icon_dir" -iname "*cassandra*" -type f \( -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.svg" -o -iname "*.ico" \) 2>/dev/null | head -5)
    fi
done

# Remove duplicates
ICON_PATHS=($(printf '%s\n' "${ICON_PATHS[@]}" | sort -u))

# Format icon paths as JSON array
ICON_JSON="["
for i in "${!ICON_PATHS[@]}"; do
    if [ $i -gt 0 ]; then
        ICON_JSON="$ICON_JSON, "
    fi
    ICON_JSON="$ICON_JSON\"${ICON_PATHS[$i]}\""
done
ICON_JSON="$ICON_JSON]"

# Create JSON output
cat <<EOF
{
  "binary_path": "$BINARY_PATH",
  "binary_name": "$BINARY_NAME",
  "display_name": "Apache Cassandra",
  "desktop_entry": $DESKTOP_ENTRY,
  "icon_paths": $ICON_JSON,
  "version": "$VERSION"
}
EOF

#!/bin/bash

# Extract metadata for Apache Cassandra

# Try to find cassandra binary using multiple methods
BINARY_PATH=""
BINARY_NAME="cassandra"

# Method 1: Check if cassandra is in PATH
if BINARY_PATH=$(command -v cassandra 2>/dev/null); then
    :
# Method 2: Check common installation paths
elif [ -f "/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra" ]; then
    BINARY_PATH="/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra"
# Method 3: Check /usr/bin
elif [ -f "/usr/bin/cassandra" ]; then
    BINARY_PATH="/usr/bin/cassandra"
# Method 4: Check /usr/local/bin
elif [ -f "/usr/local/bin/cassandra" ]; then
    BINARY_PATH="/usr/local/bin/cassandra"
fi

# If still not found, report error
if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ] || [ ! -x "$BINARY_PATH" ]; then
    BINARY_PATH="/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra"
fi

# Get version
VERSION=""
if [ -x "$BINARY_PATH" ]; then
    VERSION=$("$BINARY_PATH" -v 2>/dev/null)
fi
[ -z "$VERSION" ] && VERSION="5.0.7"

# Look for .desktop files in standard locations
DESKTOP_ENTRY="null"
if [ -f "/usr/share/applications/cassandra.desktop" ]; then
    DESKTOP_ENTRY="/usr/share/applications/cassandra.desktop"
elif find /usr/share/applications -name "*cassandra*" -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then
    DESKTOP_ENTRY=$(find /usr/share/applications -name "*cassandra*" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)
fi

# Find icon files from standard directories
ICON_PATHS=()

# Standard icon locations
for icon_dir in /usr/share/icons /usr/share/pixmaps /opt/cassandra/share/pixmaps ~/.local/share/icons; do
    if [ -d "$icon_dir" ]; then
        while IFS= read -r icon_file; do
            [ -f "$icon_file" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon_file")
        done < <(find "$icon_dir" -iname "*cassandra*" -type f \( -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.svg" -o -iname "*.ico" \) 2>/dev/null | head -5)
    fi
done

# Try to extract icon from .desktop file if found
if [ "$DESKTOP_ENTRY" != "null" ] && [ -f "$DESKTOP_ENTRY" ]; then
    ICON_NAME=$(grep -i "^Icon=" "$DESKTOP_ENTRY" | cut -d= -f2 | head -1)
    if [ -n "$ICON_NAME" ]; then
        # Search for this icon in standard locations
        for icon_path in $(find /usr/share/icons /usr/share/pixmaps -name "$ICON_NAME*" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -3); do
            [ -f "$icon_path" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon_path")
        done
    fi
fi

# Remove duplicates and sort
ICON_PATHS=($(printf '%s\n' "${ICON_PATHS[@]}" | sort -u))

# Format icon paths as JSON array
ICON_JSON="["
for i in "${!ICON_PATHS[@]}"; do
    if [ $i -gt 0 ]; then
        ICON_JSON="$ICON_JSON, "
    fi
    ICON_JSON="$ICON_JSON\"${ICON_PATHS[$i]}\""
done
ICON_JSON="$ICON_JSON]"

# Format desktop entry as JSON string or null
if [ "$DESKTOP_ENTRY" = "null" ]; then
    DESKTOP_JSON="null"
else
    DESKTOP_JSON="\"$DESKTOP_ENTRY\""
fi

# Create JSON output
cat <<EOF
{
  "binary_path": "$BINARY_PATH",
  "binary_name": "$BINARY_NAME",
  "display_name": "Apache Cassandra",
  "desktop_entry": $DESKTOP_JSON,
  "icon_paths": $ICON_JSON,
  "version": "$VERSION"
}
EOF

set -e

# Apache Cassandra Installation Script for Linux
# This script installs Cassandra from binary tarball

echo "=== Apache Cassandra Installation ==="

# Update system packages (use sudo if needed)

sudo apt-get install -y -qq openjdk-11-jdk-headless curl wget

if ! id -u cassandra > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    sudo useradd -m -d /var/lib/cassandra cassandra || true

CASSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"

MIRROR_URL="https://archive.apache.org/dist/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"

# Download and extract Cassandra

if command -v wget &> /dev/null; then
    wget -q "$MIRROR_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || wget -q "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
elif command -v curl &> /dev/null; then
    curl -s "$MIRROR_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || curl -s "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
else
    echo "Error: wget or curl not found"
    exit 1
fi

# Create necessary directories

sudo mkdir -p /var/log/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /etc/cassandra

sudo cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra-env.sh" /etc/cassandra/cassandra-env.sh || true

echo "Log directory: /var/log/cassandra"

set -e

# Apache Cassandra Installation Script for Linux
# This script installs Cassandra from binary tarball

echo "=== Apache Cassandra Installation ==="

# Update system packages (use sudo if needed)
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq openjdk-11-jdk-headless curl wget

# Create cassandra user and group if they don't exist
if ! id -u cassandra > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    sudo useradd -m -d /var/lib/cassandra cassandra || true
fi

# Define installation paths
CASSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"
CASSANDRA_USER="cassandra"
DOWNLOAD_URL="https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"
MIRROR_URL="https://archive.apache.org/dist/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"

# Create installation directory
sudo mkdir -p "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Download and extract Cassandra
echo "Downloading Apache Cassandra 5.0.7..."
if command -v wget &> /dev/null; then
    wget -q "$MIRROR_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || wget -q "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
elif command -v curl &> /dev/null; then
    curl -s "$MIRROR_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || curl -s "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
else
    echo "Error: wget or curl not found"
    exit 1
fi

sudo mkdir -p /var/log/cassandra

# Create startup configuration directory

# Cleanup

    :
# Method 2: Check common installation paths
elif [ -f "/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra" ]; then
    BINARY_PATH="/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra"
# Method 3: Check /usr/bin
elif [ -f "/usr/bin/cassandra" ]; then
    BINARY_PATH="/usr/bin/cassandra"
# Method 4: Check /usr/local/bin
elif [ -f "/usr/local/bin/cassandra" ]; then
    BINARY_PATH="/usr/local/bin/cassandra"
fi

# Get version from package manager or binary
VERSION=""

# Try dpkg first (Debian-based systems)
if command -v dpkg &>/dev/null && dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q cassandra; then
    VERSION=$(dpkg -s cassandra 2>/dev/null | grep "^Version:" | cut -d: -f2 | xargs)
fi

        VERSION=$(/opt/cassandra/bin/cassandra -v 2>/dev/null)

#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Apache Cassandra Installation Script for Linux
# This script installs Cassandra from binary tarball

echo "=== Apache Cassandra Installation ==="

# Update system packages (use sudo if needed)
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq openjdk-11-jdk-headless curl wget

# Create cassandra user and group if they don't exist
if ! id -u cassandra > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    sudo useradd -m -d /var/lib/cassandra cassandra || true
fi

# Define installation paths
CASSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"
CASSANDRA_USER="cassandra"
DOWNLOAD_URL="https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"
MIRROR_URL="https://archive.apache.org/dist/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"

# Create installation directory
sudo mkdir -p "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Download and extract Cassandra
echo "Downloading Apache Cassandra 5.0.7..."
if command -v wget &> /dev/null; then
    wget -q "$MIRROR_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || wget -q "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
elif command -v curl &> /dev/null; then
    curl -s "$MIRROR_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || curl -s "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
else
    echo "Error: wget or curl not found"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Extracting Cassandra..."
sudo tar -xzf /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz -C "$CASSANDRA_HOME" --strip-components=1

# Create necessary directories
sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /var/log/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /etc/cassandra

# Copy default configuration
sudo cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra.yaml" /etc/cassandra/cassandra.yaml || true
sudo cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra-env.sh" /etc/cassandra/cassandra-env.sh || true

# Fix permissions
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/lib/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/log/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /etc/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Create symbolic link in standard location
sudo ln -sf "$CASSANDRA_HOME/bin/cassandra" /usr/local/bin/cassandra || true

# Create startup configuration directory
sudo mkdir -p /etc/cassandra/conf.d

# Cleanup
rm -f /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz

echo "=== Installation Complete ==="
echo "Cassandra installed to: $CASSANDRA_HOME"
echo "Configuration: /etc/cassandra/"
echo "Data directory: /var/lib/cassandra"
echo "Log directory: /var/log/cassandra"

#!/bin/bash

# Apache Cassandra Launch Script

echo "=== Starting Apache Cassandra ==="

# Set environment variables
export CASSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"
export PATH="$CASSANDRA_HOME/bin:$PATH"

# Ensure data and log directories exist
sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /var/log/cassandra
sudo chown -R cassandra:cassandra /var/lib/cassandra
sudo chown -R cassandra:cassandra /var/log/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /opt/cassandra/logs
sudo chown -R cassandra:cassandra /opt/cassandra/logs

# Configure Cassandra to use standard directories

export CASSANDRA_DATA="/var/lib/cassandra"

# Start Cassandra in foreground with -R flag (force run as root for demo purposes)
echo "Starting Cassandra in foreground mode..."
echo "Cassandra will be running on port 9042 (CQL), 7000 (cluster communication), and 7199 (JMX)"
echo ""

# Run cassandra directly in foreground - this will output startup logs
exec sudo "$CASSANDRA_HOME/bin/cassandra" -f -R

#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Apache Cassandra Installation Script for Linux
# This script installs Cassandra from binary tarball

echo "=== Apache Cassandra Installation ==="

# Update system packages (use sudo if needed)
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq openjdk-11-jdk-headless curl wget

# Create cassandra user and group if they don't exist
if ! id -u cassandra > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    sudo useradd -m -d /var/lib/cassandra cassandra || true
fi

# Define installation paths
CASSANDRA_HOME="/opt/cassandra"
CASSANDRA_USER="cassandra"
DOWNLOAD_URL="https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.lua/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"
MIRROR_URL="https://archive.apache.org/dist/cassandra/5.0.7/apache-cassandra-5.0.7-bin.tar.gz"

# Create installation directory
sudo mkdir -p "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Download and extract Cassandra
echo "Downloading Apache Cassandra 5.0.7..."
if command -v wget &> /dev/null; then
    wget -q "$MIRROR_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || wget -q "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -O /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
elif command -v curl &> /dev/null; then
    curl -s "$MIRROR_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz || curl -s "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -o /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz
else
    echo "Error: wget or curl not found"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Extracting Cassandra..."
sudo tar -xzf /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz -C "$CASSANDRA_HOME" --strip-components=1

# Create necessary directories
sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /var/log/cassandra
sudo mkdir -p /etc/cassandra

# Copy default configuration
sudo cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra.yaml" /etc/cassandra/cassandra.yaml || true
sudo cp "$CASSANDRA_HOME/conf/cassandra-env.sh" /etc/cassandra/cassandra-env.sh || true

# Fix permissions
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/lib/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /var/log/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" /etc/cassandra
sudo chown -R "$CASSANDRA_USER:$CASSANDRA_USER" "$CASSANDRA_HOME"

# Create symbolic link in standard location
sudo ln -sf "$CASSANDRA_HOME/bin/cassandra" /usr/local/bin/cassandra || true

# Create startup configuration directory
sudo mkdir -p /etc/cassandra/conf.d

# Cleanup
rm -f /tmp/cassandra.tar.gz

echo "=== Installation Complete ==="
echo "Cassandra installed to: $CASSANDRA_HOME"
echo "Configuration: /etc/cassandra/"
echo "Data directory: /var/lib/cassandra"
echo "Log directory: /var/log/cassandra"
